title: gunnarella carinata
intro: Gunnarella carinata, also known as the gunnarella orchid, is a species of orchid native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Gunnarella carinata are said to include relief from fever, sore throats, and coughs, as well as aid in the treatment of wounds and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Gunnarella carinata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, or other topical applications.
